objective_zh: 学习视觉观察、草图表达、图示组织与沟通呈现的基本方法，建立将设计想法、过程与结果清晰转化为图像、图示和视觉方案的基础能力。
objective_en: Learn the basic methods of visual observation, sketching, diagrammatic organization, and presentation to build a foundational ability to clearly translate design ideas, processes, and outcomes into images, diagrams, and visual proposals.

objective_zh: 学习设计发展的历史脉络、基本理论与批评方法，建立从历史、社会与文化语境理解设计的基础能力。
objective_en: Learn the historical development, key theories, and critical approaches of design to build a foundational ability to understand design within historical, social, and cultural contexts.

objective_zh: 学习基础编程逻辑、数据处理与交互控制方法，建立面向数字设计、生成实践与交互原型的计算思维基础。
objective_en: Learn basic programming logic, data processing, and interactive control methods to build a computational foundation for digital design, generative practice, and interactive prototyping.

objective_zh: 学习设计实现中的技术原理、结构逻辑与制作方法，并结合二维组织、色彩关系与三维构造的基础训练，理解形式、空间、材料、结构与功能之间的关系，建立面向设计实现的基础认知与实践能力。
objective_en: Learn the technical principles, structural logic, and fabrication methods involved in design realization, together with foundational training in two-dimensional organization, color relationships, and three-dimensional construction, to understand the relationships among form, space, material, structure, and function, and to build a foundational understanding of design implementation and practice.

objective_zh: 学习材料属性、工艺流程与原型方法，理解从设计概念到实物实现的基本逻辑，建立通过动手实验、材料探索与反思性制作推进设计的基础能力。
objective_en: Learn material properties, fabrication processes, and prototyping methods to understand the basic logic from design concept to physical realization, and to build a foundational ability to advance design through hands-on experimentation, material exploration, and reflective making.

objective_zh: 学习人工智能辅助创意生成、设计迭代与内容生产的基本方法，建立将 AI 工具整合进设计流程，并对生成结果进行判断、调整与转化的初步能力。
objective_en: Learn the basic methods of AI-assisted ideation, design iteration, and content creation to develop an initial ability to integrate AI tools into design workflows and to evaluate, refine, and transform generated outcomes.

objective_zh: 学习图像、动态内容与数字媒介表达的基本语言与组织方式，建立面向数字平台进行视觉表达、内容构建与媒介呈现的基础能力。
objective_en: Learn the basic languages and organizing principles of imagery, motion, and digital media to build a foundational ability in visual expression, content construction, and media representation across digital platforms.

title_zh: 面向设计的观察、研究与实验
title_en: Observation, Research and Experimentation for Design
objective_zh: 通过观察、研究与实验的方法理解问题、形成判断，并将研究发现转化为设计方向与实践策略。
objective_en: Use observation, research, and experimentation to understand problems, build judgment, and translate findings into design directions and practical strategies.

objective_zh: 学习数据理解、基础计算、信息组织与可视化表达的方法，建立运用数据与计算逻辑清晰传达复杂内容的基础能力。
objective_en: Learn methods of data interpretation, basic computation, information organization, and visualization to build a foundational ability to communicate complex content clearly through data and computational logic.

objective_zh: 学习交互逻辑、时间性表达与叙事组织的基本方法，建立面向多媒介内容构建、交互体验与叙事表达的基础能力。
objective_en: Learn the basic methods of interactive logic, temporal expression, and narrative organization to build a foundational ability in multi-media content construction, interactive experience, and narrative expression.

objective_zh: 学习身体、感知、行为与环境之间的互动关系，建立从具身体验出发理解交互、空间与设计的基础能力。
objective_en: Learn the relationships among body, perception, behavior, and environment to build a foundational ability to understand interaction, space, and design from an embodied perspective.

objective_zh: 帮助学生建立对设计学院、学组方向与课程路径的整体认知，为后续学习选择提供基础。
objective_en: Introduce the design school, group orientations, and curriculum pathways to build a foundational understanding for later study choices.

objective_zh: 建立对未来职业方向、角色分工与学习目标之间关系的初步理解。
objective_en: Build an initial understanding of future career directions and how they relate to learning goals and role development.

objective_zh: 建立设计中的伦理责任、价值判断与社会影响意识。
objective_en: Develop awareness of ethical responsibility, value judgment, and social impact in design.

objective_zh: 帮助学生理解创新实践、创业路径与设计成果转化的基本逻辑。
objective_en: Help students understand innovation practice, entrepreneurship pathways, and the basic logic of turning design outcomes into action.

objective_zh: 建立项目组织、协作推进与设计管理的基础认知。
objective_en: Build a foundational understanding of project organization, collaboration, and design management.

objective_zh: 通过语言训练提升跨文化理解、学术阅读与专业沟通能力。
objective_en: Strengthen cross-cultural understanding, academic reading, and professional communication through language study.

objective_zh: 延续语言训练，支持跨文化交流、资料阅读与表达能力的提升。
objective_en: Continue language training to support intercultural exchange, reading, and articulation.

objective_zh: 通过拓展模块强化专业语境中的语言使用和国际交流能力。
objective_en: Extend language use in professional contexts and strengthen international communication abilities through advanced modules.

objective_zh: 在课程后段巩固跨文化理解和面向实践的语言表达能力。
objective_en: Consolidate cross-cultural understanding and practice-oriented language expression in the later stage of the curriculum.
